raw.message: Die StarGames-iOS-App macht Ihr Spiel flexibler! 🚀 Jetzt holen und Slots auf dem iPhone genießen.

hook.summary: A blonde character whispers 'shh' to the viewer against a pink background.
hook.visual_action: Character puts finger to lips in a whispering gesture.
hook.voiceover_transcript: Pst. Es knistert in der Luft.

scene_flow: Animated blonde woman whispers to the camera.
Close-up of a mobile phone playing Lucky Lady's Charm Deluxe slot.
Text overlay announcing up to 100 free spins.
StarGames logo reveal with BVB partnership branding.
Final call to action to download the app.
audience_proxy: German-speaking adults interested in mobile casino games and sports betting.
